name: Finance Analyst Stack
description: Credit research, live market data, macro briefings, and portfolio tracking — automated. Built for finance professionals who want an AI that speaks their language.
tagline: Credit research, market data, and macro briefings — automated.

skills.name: financial-data
skills.description: Live and historical market data — CDX spreads, OAS, ETF prices, FRED macro data.

skills.name: morning-context
skills.description: Automated morning market briefing — credit spreads, macro moves, overnight news.

env_vars.description: Free FRED API key for macro data (GDP, rates, spreads)

setup_steps.title: Add your API key
setup_steps.description: Add your Claude API key to OpenClaw settings.

setup_steps.title: Get a free FRED API key
setup_steps.description: Register at fred.stlouisfed.org for free macro data access — IG/HY OAS, rates, credit spreads.

setup_steps.title: Install finance skills
setup_steps.description: Install the finance analyst skill package.
setup_steps.command: openclaw skills install financial-data web-search morning-context

setup_steps.title: Run your first briefing
setup_steps.description: Ask your agent: "Give me a morning credit markets briefing." It will pull live OAS spreads, CDX levels, and overnight macro moves.

changelog.notes: Initial release. Built by a former head of CDS trading who got tired of doing this manually.
